text.title: VUI Testing Best Practices Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: build-corpus
step.action: Anonymise; bucket by intent + locale; synthesise variants as supplement only.

step.name: mix-stress-fixtures
step.action: Run templates/stress-corpus.sh to produce 20/10/5dB SNR mixes.

step.name: run-tier1-deterministic
step.action: Assert intent/slot/dialog-state outcomes; compute WER + intent F1 + slot F1.

step.name: run-tier2-llm-judge
step.action: Blind-score naturalness + error recovery + goal completion via templates/llm-judge-prompt.txt.

step.name: publish-tiered-report
step.action: Tier the suite (smoke / full / field-replay) + emit report.
step.decision-gate: If 429 detected during run, fail the suite.
